philosophy: My teaching philosophy is grounded in Constructivism, Experiential Learning Theory, and Universal Design for Learning. I believe students learn best when they are active participants in their own education — constructing knowledge through hands-on projects, critical reflection, and collaborative inquiry. I strive to create inclusive, culturally responsive classrooms where every student sees themselves represented in the curriculum. My goal is not only to teach technical skills in apparel design and fashion studies, but to cultivate independent thinkers who can adapt, innovate, and lead in a rapidly evolving industry.
